mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gas (id, name, detection_range, installation_height, effective_range, install_remark, priority, risk, type, mode) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{detectionRange}, #{installationHeight}, #{effectiveRange}, #{installRemark}, #{priority}, #{risk}, #{type}, #{mode})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, detection_range as detectionRange, installation_height as installationHeight, effective_range as effectiveRange, install_remark as installRemark, priority, risk, type, mode, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM gas ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, name, detection_range as detectionRange, installation_height as installationHeight, effective_range as effectiveRange, install_remark as installRemark, priority, risk, type, mode, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM gas WHERE id = #{id}
